name: Booming Bell
description:
This large bronze bell has a fine ash handle, and the clapper is made of blackened iron. It grants you a +1 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—Clarion Crescendo (2 Actions) (manipulate, sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You ring a blasting note on the bell that sends shock waves through the air. The blast deals 4d6 sonic damage to each creature in a 15-foot emanation (DC 22 Fortitude check save). On a failure, the target is also Deafened for 1 round.
